name: Limitless Golf Club
about: Limitless Golf Club is a membership-based indoor golf training facility focused on year-round practice and player development. The venue features seven simulator bays and a 7,000 square foot training area with state-of-the-art short game practice zones, including a chipping range with bunker and turf variations, and a putting green with multiple hole locations. All use of the facility requires a membership, and the club's philosophy emphasizes serious training for golfers of all ages and skill levels, offering professional instruction and club fitting services to support members' goals.
why_golfers_like_it: Immediate feedback from professional-grade Foresight launch monitors
Access to 40+ golf courses and practice simulations for year-round training
Realistic short game areas designed to replicate on-course conditions
Membership model provides unlimited access to practice facilities

food_and_drink.notes: No food or beverage service available. The club is a training facility similar to a local gym.
No alcohol served. The club is a training facility similar to a local gym.

simulator_hardware.notes: 7 expansive simulator bays with technology utilized by most golf professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own golf equipment to use the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, Limitless Golf Club is a training facility and does not allow outside food or drink on premises.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A simulator hour is a 60-minute session, in which members can choose to play 18 holes on any golf course on the LGC network, practice on the range, or work on specific skillsets.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Limitless Golf Club offers specific academy and team memberships for middle and high school golfers, indicating a commitment to junior development.
